title: Mod Updater
description: Automatically update your mods with a zip file on Dropbox, Google Drive or even your own http webserver!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f42298de7a4f3c5e4dcc63675ab7b49e104ca8c2.png)

Want to make a automaticly updating zip for your friends so they dont yell at you for adding more mods? Look no further! _I have experience_ Make your firiends install this and set the zip in the config file to your way of getting it - It Needs To Be HTTP/HTTPS - Dropbox needs to have "dl=1" at the end otherwise it wont work! ### I made the icon in ms paint ![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XwTZErnT/7ea6902d809fcd87a627b5b5b1cbd7af337aeb05.png) This mod CANNOT delete removed mods! _for now..._ ## DEDICATED SERVER SCRIPT [Download Link](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/i3mqonqxnsoaqrc247rvf/main.py?rlkey=1r8rixtcz6erse65ctv0m9gzj&dl=1) [View Link](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/i3mqonqxnsoaqrc247rvf/main.py?rlkey=1r8rixtcz6erse65ctv0m9gzj&dl=0)
